name: signed_volume_trend
description: EMA of price-direction-signed volume; positive when volume backs up price advances, negative when it backs up declines.
function_body:
def compute(df, window=10):
  import pandas as pd
  vol = pd.Series(df["volume"])
  price = pd.Series(df.get("close", df.get("adjusted_close")))
  dirn = price.diff().fillna(0).apply(lambda x: 1 if x > 0 else (-1 if x < 0 else 0))
  signed = dirn * vol
  trend = signed.ewm(span=window, adjust=False).mean()
  return trend.fillna(0)

name: volume_curvature
description: Quadratic-fit second derivative of volume; captures acceleration/deceleration of participation.

name: volume_mad_score
description: Median/MAD-based volume z-score; robust to outliers for spike/dry-up detection.
function_body:
def compute(df, window=20):
  import numpy as np
  import pandas as pd
  v = pd.Series(df["volume"])
  med = v.rolling(window, min_periods=window).median()
  mad = v.rolling(window, min_periods=window).apply(lambda x: (x.sub(x.median()).abs().median()), raw=False)
  scale = 1.4826
  score = (v - med) / (mad * scale)
  score = score.replace([np.inf, -np.inf], np.nan)
  return score.fillna(0)

name: volume_percentile_rank
description: Rolling percentile rank of volume within the last window; 1.0 = top of window, 0 = bottom.

name: volume_slope
description: Rolling linear regression slope of volume; positive = increasing participation.

name: volume_zscore
description: Rolling z-score of volume to flag unusual participation
